Deer Cracker Mod

The Deer Cracker Mod introduces a brand-new food item to Minecraft: the Deer Cracker! This crunchy treat provides a unique way to restore hunger and is crafted using simple ingredients.
body:
Deer Cracker Mod

The Deer Cracker Mod introduces a brand-new food item to Minecraft: the Deer Cracker! This crunchy treat provides a unique way to restore hunger and is crafted using simple ingredients.

Features:

New Item: Deer Cracker – a delicious and crispy snack.

Balanced Hunger Restoration: Provides a fair amount of hunger and saturation.

Easy Crafting Recipe: Made from common ingredients, perfect for early and late-game survival.

Vanilla-Friendly: Fits seamlessly into the Minecraft world.


Download now and enjoy a new way to snack in Minecraft! 🦌✨

 

Made in germany with love. <3 🇩🇪
